name: All Jersey Landscaping Inc.
hours: Monday: Open 24 hours | Tuesday: Open 24 hours | Wednesday: Open 24 hours | Thursday: Open 24 hours | Friday: Open 24 hours

reviews.author: nancy ernst susak
reviews.text:
I’ve been using All Jersey Landscaping for 2 years mainly for their lawn mowing service, and have been very happy.  I decided to have my front beddings converted from mulch to stone and I am extremely happy with the outcome.  They trimmed the bushes, removed the old mulch, put down new weed barrier, added a border, and then the stone.  This was done in 90+ weather and I know how hard they worked!

Thank you All Jersey Landscaping for improving on the curb appeal of my home!  When I am ready to upgrade my backyard, I will contact you!

reviews.author: Ellen Burke
reviews.text: All Jersey put in a patio for me. It was a smaller job but they still approached it with enthusiasm and communicated exactly how it would be installed. I got another estimate and their pricing was competitive, they do excellent work and Chris was so professional and responsive!

reviews.author: Mary P
reviews.text: Another fabulous job by Chris and his crew from All Jersey! Chris removed a tree from our property. He replaced it with a crepe Myrtle that he helped us pick out. He and his crew did a wonderful job prepping the area and placing the tree in the best spot and then beautifying the area with mulch. We are so pleased with the outcome. Chris and his crew are truly a pleasure to work with and we highly recommend them!

service_descriptions.lawn care: Regular lawn mowing, edging, and maintenance to keep your yard looking sharp.
service_descriptions.mulching: Mulch installation to protect plant roots, retain moisture, and improve curb appeal.
service_descriptions.hardscaping: Patio, walkway, and retaining wall installation using stone, pavers, and concrete.
service_descriptions.landscape design: Custom landscape design and installation to transform your outdoor space.
service_descriptions.cleanup: Seasonal cleanup including leaf removal, bed clearing, and property cleanup.
service_descriptions.snow removal: Residential and commercial snow removal to keep your property safe and accessible.

faqs.a: Yes, we provide free estimates for all lawn care and landscaping projects.
Yes, we carry full liability insurance so your property is protected throughout every job.

faqs.q: Do you offer recurring maintenance plans?
faqs.a: Yes, we offer weekly, bi-weekly, and monthly lawn care plans to keep your property looking great all season.
We serve the greater Philadelphia and surrounding area, including nearby towns and suburbs.

faqs.q: Do you handle both residential and commercial properties?
faqs.a: Yes, we work with homeowners, property managers, and commercial clients throughout the area.
